name: Baby Shark Fry (Tiburoncito Helen Margoth)
recipeInstructions:
1. Fillet the shark and remove the skin.
2. Divide the fish into 4 pieces or use shark steaks ready to cook.
3. Fry the tomato and onion in 1 tsp of oil for 3 minutes to make a simple sauce.
4. In another skillet, heat 3 tbsp of oil over moderate heat.
5. Dip each shark piece into the flour, then coat with beaten egg.
6. Brown each side for 3 minutes in the oil.
7. Drain briefly on a paper towel.
8. Serve warm and pour the sauce over the pieces.
